QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_14_Payout4_3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout4_4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_17_Payout1_1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.
QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any spin, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown above the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: Any win in the first round will increase the second round's multiplier to x2.
QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: Any win in the second round will increase the third round's multiplier to x3.
QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_4_Payout2_4: Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round's (and beyond) multiplier to x5.
QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: 3 or more Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature.
QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: Players may choose to start the Free Spins Feature with: 20 free spins with multipliers of x1/x2/x3/x5, 10 free spins with multipliers of x3/x6/x9/x20, or 5 free spins with multipliers of x6/x12/x18/x40.
QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: If the Free Spins Feature is triggered by more than 3 Scatter symbols, each additional Scatter symbol will add 4 more free spins to the 20 free spins selection; 2 more free spins to the 10 free spins selection; and 1 more free spin to the 5 free spins selection.
QueenOfBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_4_Payout3_4: Tap on any selection to begin the free spins with the stated number of free spins and its respective multipliers.

QueenOfBountyRule.Rule1_1: Queen of Bounty is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring cascading symbols with increasing multipliers and free spins selections.
QueenOfBountyRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
QueenOfBountyRule.Rule1_19: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
